settings.title: What is it?
settings.content: Laushe's Pure Honey is a 100% raw, sunnah-blessed superfood harvested with care to preserve its natural enzymes and healing properties.

settings.title: Who's it for
settings.content: Perfect for anyone seeking a natural sweetener that also supports immune health and overall daily vitality.

settings.title: Benefits
settings.content:
Natural source of antioxidants and healthy enzymes
Provides a quick energy boost without refined sugars
Soothes occasional throat discomfort and promotes wellness
Supports healthy digestion and gut balance
Ethically harvested and raw for maximum nutritional benefit
No artificial additives, fillers, or sweeteners

settings.title: How to use
settings.content:
Enjoy a spoonful daily on its own for natural energy
Use as a healthy sweetener in herbal teas or desserts
Drizzle over yogurt, oatmeal, or fresh fruit
Combine with warm water and lemon for a soothing morning drink

settings.heading: Raw, Pure, and Rooted in Tradition.
settings.subheading: Supported by nature, backed by tradition.

settings.title: 100% Raw Honey
settings.desc: Unprocessed and unfiltered to maintain every natural benefit

settings.heading: Daily Natural Wellness
settings.step1_text: One spoonful daily for natural energy
settings.step2_text: Use as a healthy natural sweetener

settings.question: Is your honey raw?
settings.answer: Yes, our honey is 100% raw, unfiltered, and unprocessed to ensure you get every natural enzyme and nutritional benefit.

settings.headline: Unlock Nature's Sweetness
settings.subtext: Nourish your body with pure, raw honey for improved immunity and natural energy.
